judge_result.short_rationale: Core eye-rinsing action is present and usable, but the answer changes the contact lens timing from after 5 minutes to immediately if easy, and it replaces the required poison control center/doctor treatment advice with emergency medical attention. It also adds unsupported advice about neutralizing agents or eye drops.
